creator: ginga-freebsd@ginganet.org
text:
In Fri, Sep 27, 2013 at 09:40:10AM +0000,
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of japanese/ng-devel,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/182436 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182436

This PR is posted by maintainer (i.e. me).
It is a simple bug fix patch (build error on 10-current).

Regards,
Ginga
